title: 10 best herbal creams for stomach pain
description: Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, creams helps with stomach pain because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The extract from the leaves of the Ginkgo biloba tree has been used for centuries to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The cream works by penetrating deep into the skin, reaching the underlying tissues and reducing pain and discomfort.
